# subscript(_:)

**Instance Subscript**

Gets the value associated with the specified attachment.

## Declaration

```swift
subscript(key: String) -> CMAttachmentBearerAttachments.Value? { get set }
```

## Accessing Attachments

- **subscript(_:)**: Gets the value associated with the specified attachment key.
- **CMAttachmentBearerAttachments.Value**: An enumeration of attachment values.

items.description: Gets the value associated with the specified attachment key.
